summary: Modal refactoring testing - All main site modals (ConsultationForm, PersonaModal, ScheduleVisitModal, QuickViewModal) verified working correctly after rebuild. Build was stale and required fresh rebuild.
action_items: NOTE: Build was stale - the source code in ConsultationForm.tsx correctly used Modal component, but the built JS had old code with custom modal implementation. After `yarn build`, all modals work correctly.
ExitIntentPopup was not manually tested (triggers on mouse leaving page top) but code review confirms it uses Modal component correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Modal.tsx implementation is correct with proper ESC handling, backdrop click, scroll lock, and data-testid attributes
All modal consumers (ConsultationForm, BookingModal, PersonaModal, ScheduleVisitModal, ExitIntentPopup) correctly import and use the Modal component
QuickViewModal intentionally keeps custom implementation for mobile slide-up behavior as documented
updated_files: None - only performed rebuild to fix stale cache
context_for_next_testing_agent: All modals refactored to use reusable Modal component are working correctly. Modal features verified: open/close via X button, ESC key, backdrop click. All modals have data-testid='modal-close-button' for the close button. QuickViewModal keeps its own implementation for mobile slide-up behavior.

ConsultationForm_Modal.form_fields_exist: PASS (name, email, phone, message, submit button)

PersonaModal.persona_cards: PASS (4 cards: Homeowner, Architect, Developer, Commercial)

BookingModal.status: Not directly tested - ScheduleVisitModal tested instead

ExitIntentPopup.status: Not manually tested - triggers on mouse exit intent

modal_component_features_verified: Body scroll lock (overflow: hidden when open)
Configurable sizes (sm, md, lg, xl, full)

build_issue_identified.issue: Stale build was serving old ConsultationForm code with custom modal implementation
build_issue_identified.evidence: Built JS in .next/static/chunks had 'absolute top-4 right-4' close button class instead of Modal component's 'p-1 rounded-lg' class
build_issue_identified.after_rebuild: All modals correctly use Modal component with data-testid='modal-close-button'
